title: Resource Graphs, Cache Evidence, Budgets, and Performance Non-Claims
description: The tool reports document bytes as total page weight, ignores encoded versus decoded sizes and browser discovery, and turns one server timing into user performance. Learners cumulatively produce static resource and delivery evidence dossier through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inventory document, style, script, image, font, media, module, preload, and third-party references with source and scope.
Separate wire, decoded, retained, intrinsic-media, rendered, and duplicate-transfer sizes with missing evidence visible.
Report cache fields, validators, variation, redirects, compression, and cold or warm assumptions without simulating browser cache blindly.
